summary: International user plain ESPN archive - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for archive game playback
AND a regular season game is archived with ESPN broadcaster
AND the game is not ESPN Sunday Night Baseball

steps.action: WHEN a user selects an archive ESPN game tile
steps.result:
THEN a feed select modal displays
AND buttons for Recap and Condensed Game display center justified, above the game feed
AND the user will see an ESPN feed button for the home team
AND the user achieves playback after selecting each button
